label: Fur
description: Defines a fur style for animal-bodied pawns (e.g. gene-driven fur). Inherits all StyleItemDef fields.

bodyTypeGraphicPaths.label: Body type graphic paths
bodyTypeGraphicPaths.description: Per-body-type texture paths used to render this fur. Child element name is the BodyTypeDef defName; text is the texture atlas path.

per-body-type-fur.label: Per-body-type fur
per-body-type-fur.description: Fur style with no base texture, rendered per body type, matching the shipped Furskin pattern.

no-graphic-fur.label: No-graphic fur
no-graphic-fur.description: Fur slot that renders nothing (e.g. a "no fur" option).
